# TGA Church

TGA Church is a Spirit-filled Christian community based in Ghana, committed to building faith, changing lives, and serving communities.

## What We Do
- Weekly worship services across multiple branch locations in Ghana
- Sermons and biblical teaching available online
- Community events, fellowships, and outreach programs
- Books, devotionals, and church merchandise available in our store
- Giving and financial support for the ministry

## Our Pages
- Home: Welcome, latest sermons, upcoming events, testimonies
- About: Our story, mission, vision, and core values
- Sermons: Full archive of messages and teachings
- Events: Upcoming services, programs, and community events
- Branches: All church locations with service times and contact details
- Leadership: Our pastoral team and church leaders
- Giving: Ways to support the ministry financially
- Store: Books and merchandise
- Gallery: Photos from services and events
- Contact: Get in touch with us

## Contact
Website: https://tgachurch.org
